title: Applecraft 2.0
description: A new version of my CurseForge Applecraft Project
body:
A small modpack focused on improving exploring and building experience by adding more Buildings, Structures and dungeons to conquer and loot as well as extending the tools available for builders. It includes an End Overhaul to make exploring more exciting in late game as well as more biomes to explore in both nether and the overworld. 

It comes shipped with Shader Support through Iris as well as performance mods like sodium and nvidium. A default Shader and Texture Pack is also included. It also features some QOL of mods like JEI, JourneyMap, Shulker Tooltips and Appleskin. Some fun mods like Barrel Role for Elytra are added as well, but can be disabled as wished.

Its mostly ment for our small server, which is shipped with the modpack from version 2.0.2 onwards, but can also be used for single- or multiplayer worlds.

# IMPORTANT
For Singleplayer Worlds, the _LuckPerms Placeholder_ Mod needs to be disabled. Otherwise your Client will Crash. This is a Mod only needed for Servers and also only on the server side. You can savely disable this when connecting to a server as well
